posts.text: I think it is because of the rising commodity prices, and the market is afraid of margin compression due to the higher input prices. Disclosure: invested.

posts.author: TejaG
posts.text: I would like to know the views on Transrail Lighting. Company has made the following points concall recently project is on track for completion by June or July of the next financial year, with approximately Rs. 600 crores to Rs. 700 crores of work remaining. Receivables from the project are currently around Rs. 488 crores , and management noted that payments are being received on time as it is a project of national importance. revenue growth guidance from 24%–25% to 26%–27% plus for the current year. For order inflows, they expect to cross the Rs. 9,500–10,000 crore mark this year, supported b…
